chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 2414 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority: 1. For hearing of CMA No.11259/2020 (Stay): 2. For hearing of Main Case: 20.05.2020: M/S Arshad M. Tayebaly, Omar Memon and Irfan Aziz, advocates for the petitioners. Mr. Salman Talibuddin, Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shah, Addl. Advocate General Sindh. ---------- Learned Advocate General Sindh files statement dated 20.05.2020 along with copy of The Sindh COVID-19 Emergency Relief Ordinance, 2020, gazetted on 18.05.2020, which are taken on record. He submits that the above Ordinance has superseded clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of the impugned special order dated 28.04.2020. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that since other clauses of the aforesaid special order as well as the newly inserted Rules 19-A to 19-E have also been impugned in the present petition, the petition should be heard in respect thereof. The interim orders passed earlier need not be extended as clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of the impugned special order dated 28.04.2020 have now lost the field in view of promulgation of the above Ordinance. By consent, adjourned to date in office. J U D G E J U D G E
